form.title: Build your link
form.siteSelectHint: Selecting a site fills the website URL field below.

form.sourceHint: Where the traffic comes from — e.g. google, newsletter, twitter.
form.mediumHint: The marketing channel — e.g. cpc, email, social.
form.campaignHint: Name to identify this campaign — e.g. summer_sale.
form.contentHint: Differentiates ads or links within the same campaign.

preview.title: Generated URL
preview.description: Fill in the Website URL and Campaign source to generate a tagged link.

reference.title: Parameter reference
reference.source: Identifies where the traffic comes from (e.g. google, newsletter).
reference.medium: The marketing channel (e.g. cpc, email, social).
reference.campaign: Associates one or more links with a specific campaign.
reference.content: Differentiates ads or links within the same campaign.

tracking.description: Copy and paste the code below into your website's HTML. Automatic tracking is enabled by default for outbound clicks, downloads, and form submissions.
tracking.collectDntDescription: Track users even if "Do Not Track" is enabled in their browser.
tracking.disableBeaconDescription: Use standard fetch requests instead of navigator.sendBeacon.
tracking.autoTrackingDescription: HitKeep can automatically send privacy-safe outbound_click, file_download, and form_submit events from hk.js.
tracking.outboundTrackingDescription: Send outbound_click when visitors follow links to a different hostname.
tracking.downloadTrackingDescription: Send file_download for links with download attributes or known file extensions.
tracking.formTrackingDescription: Send form_submit for browser-observed form submissions without capturing form values.

verifier.title: Live tracking verifier
verifier.description: Confirm that this site is receiving operational tracking signals.
verifier.waitingHint: Waiting for the first accepted hit. This panel refreshes automatically for two minutes.
verifier.mismatchHint: The latest detected hostname does not match this site's configured domain.

tracking.webVitalsDescription: Load the separate Web Vitals bundle and send LCP, INP, CLS, FCP, and TTFB samples. Off by default.

console.title: System status
console.subtitle: Monitor runtime health, storage posture, mail delivery, spam protection, and administrator activity from one operator surface.

console.healthDescription: Readiness signals for the current node and embedded data store.
console.overviewDescription: Build, version, public URL, and runtime mode.
console.featuresDescription: Operator feature switches and runtime capabilities reported by the instance.
console.storageDescription: DuckDB files, tenant storage, and disk availability.
console.ingestDescription: Recent tracking volume and blocked traffic across the instance.
console.cachesDescription: LRU cache occupancy for auth, API clients, and rate limiting.
console.backupsDescription: Configured backup target, retention, and recent execution health.
console.spamDescription: Spam filter cache freshness and manual refresh control.
console.mailDescription: Redacted mail transport configuration and a safe test-send action.
console.usersDescription: Instance roles, recovery actions, and administrator access.
console.sitesDescription: All sites visible to instance administrators.
console.teamsDescription: Team containers and their operational status.
console.auditDescription: Append-only activity for sensitive instance operations.

series.description: Event occurrences over the selected period.
series.emptyDescription: Select an event to view activity over time.

breakdown.selectEventFirst: Select an event to view a property breakdown.
breakdown.selectPropertyFirst: Select a property to view the breakdown.

aiChatbots.title: AI Chatbots
aiChatbots.noSiteDescription: Select or create a site to view AI chatbot analytics.

header.title: On-site AI chatbot analytics
header.description: Track conversation starts, prompts, responses, handoffs, and assisted conversions from your chatbot instrumentation.

chart.title: Conversation activity
chart.description: See how chatbot sessions progress over time, from the first message to handoff and assisted outcomes.
chart.emptyDescription: Track assistant.chat_started and related events to populate this report.

exportStatus.error: Failed to export AI chatbot data. Please try again.

aiVisibility.title: AI Visibility
aiVisibility.noSiteDescription: Select or create a site to view AI fetch and correlation analytics.

header.title: AI visibility analytics
header.description: Track server-side AI crawler fetches, where crawl errors concentrate, and which fetched pages later attract AI-referred visits.

chart.title: Fetch volume over time
chart.description: See when forwarded AI crawler fetches hit your content and how fetch demand changes across the selected period.
chart.emptyDescription: Forward AI fetch records to /api/sites/{id}/ingest/ai-fetch to populate this report. hk.js by itself will not record crawler fetches.

correlation.title: Fetch-to-visit correlation
correlation.description: Measure which fetched paths later attract AI-referred human visits and which high-fetch pages still fail to convert into downstream traffic.
correlation.note: Assistant, operator, and resource-type filters apply to fetches only. Correlated visits include any later AI-referred human visits on the same path within the selected window.

help.correlatedPaths: Fetched paths that later received AI-referred human visits in the selected window.
help.aiVisits: Human visits attributed to AI referrers on paths that were also fetched by AI crawlers.
help.uncorrelatedFetches: Fetches on paths that did not produce a matching AI-referred visit in this window.
help.citationYieldCard: Use this to spot pages where AI crawler demand is translating into downstream visits.
help.opportunityCard: Use this to find heavily fetched pages that still need better content, links, or availability.
help.failureHotspotCard: Use this to find assistant and path-prefix pairs where crawler access is running into errors.

citationYield.title: Citation yield
citationYield.description: Paths where AI fetches most often turn into later AI-referred visits.
citationYield.empty: No fetched paths produced correlated AI visits in this range.

opportunityPages.title: Opportunity pages
opportunityPages.description: High-fetch pages with low downstream visits or elevated error pressure.
opportunityPages.empty: No opportunity pages matched the current filters.

failureHotspots.title: Failure hotspots
failureHotspots.description: The assistant and path-prefix combinations with the highest fetch error pressure.
failureHotspots.empty: No failure hotspots matched the current filters.

exportStatus.error: Failed to export AI fetch data. Please try again.

auth.description: Use one of these credentials depending on the endpoint security requirements.

errors.loadVersions: Failed to load API doc versions.
errors.loadSpec: Failed to load API reference for this version.

states.noMatchingProperties: No matching Search Console properties for this site.
states.noMappingSync: Map a Search Console property before syncing.

confirm.disconnectMessage: Future imports stop. Imported data stays.
confirm.removeMappingMessage: Future imports stop for this site.

errors.apiDisabled: Enable the Search Console API, then refresh.

setup.title: Connect Search Console
setup.manageText: Connect or map Search Console to add search query data here.
setup.readonlyText: Ask your team or site operator to connect Search Console.

chart.title: Revenue over time
chart.description: Track revenue and completed purchases for the active date range.

breakdowns.title: Revenue breakdown
breakdowns.description: Compare product performance and revenue attribution in one place.

products.title: Top products
products.description: See which products drive the most revenue and completed orders.
products.empty: No purchase items matched the current filters.

sources.title: Revenue sources
sources.description: Attribute revenue to source, medium, campaign, and referrer.
sources.empty: No revenue sources matched the current filters.

empty.title: No ecommerce data yet
empty.description: Track purchase, begin_checkout, add_to_cart, and view_item events to populate ecommerce analytics.

ecommerce.noSiteDescription: Select a site to view ecommerce analytics.

digest.title: Weekly digest preview
digest.subtitle: Top recommendations that would be emailed for this site.
digest.noSend: No opportunity email would be sent for this site yet.

checkout_conversion.title: Review checkout drop-off
checkout_conversion.summary: Checkout starts are converting at {{conversion_rate}} across {{checkout_starts}} starts.
checkout_conversion.action: Inspect checkout friction before adding more traffic.

ai_visibility.title: Review AI crawler attention
ai_visibility.summary: AI assistants requested {{requests}} pages; the strongest path is {{top_path}}.
ai_visibility.action: Strengthen the crawled page with clearer answers and conversion context.

traffic_quality.title: Review traffic from {{source}}
traffic_quality.summary: {{source}} produced {{source_hits}} visits out of {{total_pageviews}} pageviews in this window.
traffic_quality.action: Inspect the landing pages and intent for visitors from {{source}}.

web_vitals_performance.title: Review {{metric}} performance on {{path}}
web_vitals_performance.summary: {{metric}} p75 is {{p75}} with a {{rating}} rating across {{samples}} samples.
web_vitals_performance.action: Prioritize the slowest page before it drags more visitor sessions into poor Web Vitals.

search_visibility.title: Review pages already visible in search
search_visibility.summary: Search shows {{impressions}} impressions at {{ctr}} CTR; estimated missed clicks: {{estimated_clicks}}.
search_visibility.action: Improve the snippet, title, and on-page answer for the queries already earning impressions.
search_visibility.digest: Search visibility shows about {{estimated_clicks}} missed clicks.

conversion_signal.title: Review tracked events as conversion signals
conversion_signal.summary: {{event_names}} are tracked across {{pageviews}} pageviews, but no conversion event is ranking opportunities yet.
conversion_signal.action: Pick the event that best represents a lead, signup, or purchase and mark it as a conversion signal.
conversion_signal.digest: Tracked events need a conversion signal.

setup_goal_suggestion.title: Create a goal for {{event_name}}
setup_goal_suggestion.summary: {{event_name}} fired {{event_count}} times, but it is not saved as a goal yet.
setup_goal_suggestion.action: Create an event goal with value {{goal_value}} so HitKeep can rank conversion opportunities around it.

setup_funnel_suggestion.title: Create a funnel from {{start_path}} to {{conversion_event}}
setup_funnel_suggestion.summary: {{start_path}} has traffic and {{conversion_event}} fired {{event_count}} times, but those steps are not saved as a funnel yet.
setup_funnel_suggestion.action: Create a {{step_count}}-step funnel for {{funnel_steps}} so HitKeep can monitor drop-off before the conversion.

tracking_setup.title: Collect enough signal for recommendations
tracking_setup.summary: Add conversion events so opportunities can be ranked.
tracking_setup.action: Verify the tracker and add one conversion event.

aiStatus.disabledHint: Saved opportunities remain available. New AI-written explanations are skipped until an instance owner enables AI.
aiStatus.notConfiguredHint: Saved opportunities remain available. Configure an AI provider to refresh summaries with model-written context.
aiStatus.budgetExhaustedHint: AI refreshes are paused because the configured request or token budget is exhausted for this window.

detail.readOnly: You have read-only access to this site. Ask a site admin to save, dismiss, or mark opportunities done.

empty.title: No opportunities match this view
empty.body: Try a different type or status filter.

opportunities.noSiteDescription: Select a site to view opportunity recommendations.

webVitals.error: Web Vitals data could not be loaded.
webVitals.noSiteDescription: Select or create a site to inspect Web Vitals over time.

chart.title: {{metric}} p75 trend
chart.description: The 75th percentile over the selected range, bucketed for fast incident review.

distribution.title: Rating mix
distribution.description: Site-wide {{metric}} samples. Click a rating to find pages in that quality band.

pages.title: Page breakdown
pages.description: All paths with {{metric}} samples in the selected range. Click a rating in the mix above to rank the pages that need attention.
pages.filteredDescription: Showing paths that produced {{rating}} {{metric}} samples in the selected range. Narrow the time range above to inspect a specific incident window.
pages.empty: No Web Vitals samples match the current filters.

breakdown.title: {{dimension}} breakdown
breakdown.description: {{metric}} p75 by visitor context for the selected path and rating scope.
breakdown.empty: No breakdown rows match the current filters.

empty.title: No Web Vitals yet
empty.description: Enable Web Vitals in the tracking snippet to start collecting opt-in performance samples.
